Child part collection.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Child part collection From BOP Store & LC area
Child part collection.Reaction Plan: Put rejection tag, store in identified rejection area and inform to Production incharge

Voltage.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Current.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Gas Flow.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Welding wire.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Child Part Verification (Qty. As per SOP.Product: Child Part Verification (Qty. As per SOP)
Child Part Verification (Qty. As per SOP.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Ensure Child Parts Availability and Qty. should as per drawing / SOP
Child Part Verification (Qty. As per SOP.Control Method:
*Refer work instruction and SOP (SOP/92187146/C-1)
*Check and confirm part availability and qty. by operator before start tack welding.
*OK identification in part by operator after welding.
Child Part Verification (Qty. As per SOP.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Tack Welding Location.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance:
*Ensure Tack Welding Location as per SOP
*Ensure No tack welding at no welding zone
Tack Welding Location.Control Method:
*Refer work instruction and SOP (SOP/92187146/C-1)
*OK identification in part by operator after welding
Tack Welding Location.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Tack Welding Sequence.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Ensure Tack Welding Sequence as per SOP
Tack Welding Sequence.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Tack Welding Fillet Size.Control Method:
*1st and Last Piece check by fillet gauge in every shift.
*100% verification by operator visually.
*OK identification in part by operator after welding
*Refer work instruction and SOP (SOP/92187146/C-1)
Tack Welding Fillet Size.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Tack Welding Length.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Welding quality.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance:
* Countinous, Even & smooth weld run with minimun stopage
* Avoid the weld stopage from radius & corners
* Free from all type weld defects Defects (Like porosity, under cut, spatters, weld missing, under fillet, more weld joints etc. (Ref. std ENS0211)
Welding quality.Control Method:
* Fixture Validation and Gauges Callibratin to be ensure as per "FIXTURE & GAUGE CALIBRATION  PLAN SHEET" (F/PLG/FMNT/01)
* Fixture PM plan to be followed as per "Fixture PM master plan sheet"
(F/PLG/FMNT/01)
*For Category-1 weld inspection 100% and other to be check as per sampling plan.
*All the Welding Fillets as per Welding Check Sheet.
Welding quality.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Welding tolerance.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance:
1.Leg size tolerance : 
+3/-0 (Ensure Leg size difference within 2 mm)
2.Weld length tolerance : 
(Weld Length≤25 = +12/-0) /
(Weld Length>25 = +25/-0)
Welding tolerance.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the rework tag on non conforming parts for rework.

Full Welding Fillet Size.Control Method:
*1st and Last Piece check by fillet gauge in every shift.
*100% verification by operator visually.

*Refer work instruction and SOP (SOP/92187146/C-1)
Full Welding Fillet Size.Reaction Plan:

Inform to production supervisor. Put the tag on non conforming parts for rework with idenfication tag.

Welding quality.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance:
* Countinous, Even & smooth weld run with minimun stopage
* Avoid the weld stopage from radius & corners
* Free from all type weld defects Defects (Like porosity, under cut, spatters, weld missing, under fillet, more weld joints etc. (Ref. std ENS0211)
Welding quality.Control Method:
* Deploy only qualify welder on job.
* Inprocess inspection report & record register.
* Layout Inspection once in every year
*Part Fitment checksheet to be followed for 100% Inspection.
*Fixture Validation and Gauges Callibratin to be ensure as per "FIXTURE & GAUGE CALIBRATION  PLAN SHEET"
* Fixture PM plan to be followed as per "Fixture PM master plan sheet"
*For Category-1 weld inspection 100% and other to be check as per sampling plan.
*All the Welding Fillets as per Welding Check Sheet.
Welding quality.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the tag on non conforming parts for rework with idenfication tag.

Finishing.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Free From Weld spatters, Welding lumps, Sharp edges, & Other defects.
Finishing.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the tag on non conforming parts for rework with idenfication tag.

Finshing/ Deburring.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Free from sharp edges, Spatter & other defects
Finshing/ Deburring.Reaction Plan:
* Put the tag on non conforming parts for rework & stop the parts for next process
* Inform to production supervisor

Lifiting of trolly.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: To be put on flight bar

Temperature.Control Method: By heat up through Hot Water Generator
Temperature.Reaction Plan: If low increase temp. & If High decrease temp.

Spray Pressure.Reaction Plan: Incase of high/low adjust with regulator.

Oil Content.Reaction Plan: If more change over the bath.

Total Alkali.Reaction Plan: If low add Bonderite 550 BA,If high add Raw water

Temperature.Control Method: By heat up through Hot Water Generator
Temperature.Reaction Plan: If low increase temp. & If High decrease temp.

Oil Content.Reaction Plan: If more change over the bath.

Spray Pressure.Reaction Plan: Incase of high/low adjust with regulator.

Total Alkali.Reaction Plan: If low add Bonderite 50,If high add Raw water

pH.Reaction Plan: If low add Granostarter 15,If high add Raw water

Total Acidy.Reaction Plan: If low add Bonderite 2030 A,If high add Raw water

Free Acidy.Reaction Plan: If low add Bonderite 2030 A,If high add Raw water

Gas point.Reaction Plan: If low add Bonderite 130,If high add Raw water

Temperature.Control Method: By heat up through Hot Water Generator
Temperature.Reaction Plan: If low increase temp. & If High decrease temp.

Co. Weight.Reaction Plan: If low add Bonderite 2030 A,If high add Raw water

Spray Pressure.Reaction Plan: Incase of high/low adjust with regulator.

Appearance.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Part should be whitish in color.

Temperature.Control Method: By heat up through Hot Water Generator

Unloading.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Unload and put on the pallet

Putty.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: As per requirement to achieve smooth surface quality and good appearance in A class recommended area as per SOP
Putty.Control Method:
*Record in inprocess register
*Inspection at Quality gate-2
Putty.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Finishing.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Do sandering operation where required to achieve smooth surface
Finishing.Control Method:
*Record in inprocess register
*Inspection at Quality gate-2
Finishing.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Primer Application.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance:
Primer application done in following specified areas :
1. Incomplete area of the CED.
2. Area where CED removed due to sandering operation.
Primer Application.Control Method:
*Record in inprocess register
*Inspection at Quality gate-2
Primer Application.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Air Cleaning.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: door should be clean by Air Pressure
Air Cleaning.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Tagorat Cleaning.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Clean the door by cloth (Use 1 tegorat cloth in maximum 2 doors)
Tagorat Cleaning.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Material.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance:
Should be as per as per CNH CE POWER TAN STD 86628042
Verify Manufacturing date, Expiry Date And Paint code As per quality plan
Material.Control Method:
1) Material buying from approved Source. 
2) 100% Incoming inspection with report Record
Material.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production in charge

Top Coat.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Paint should be done with beckers CE POWERTAN paint
Top Coat.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production in charge

Viscosity.Control Method: Check viscosity after paint mixup every time
Viscosity.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production in charge

Ratio (Paint : Hardener).Control Method: Record in inprocess register/ Inprocess inspection report
Ratio (Paint : Hardener).Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production in charge

Baking.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Should be baked at temperature 80'C for 30 min.
Baking.Control Method: Maintain Register for baking time record
Baking.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production in charge

Appearance.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: should cover over all surface of the part, no rundown, fumes bubbles or shade difference, paint uncover, Orange Peel etc.
Appearance.Control Method: Record in inprocess register/ Inprocess inspection report
Appearance.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production in charge

Inspection(Quality Gate No.-2 & 3).Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: As per requirement to achieve smooth surface quality and good appearance as per before top coat inspection check sheet
Inspection(Quality Gate No.-2 & 3).Control Method: *100% Inspection as per Selant check sheet *100% Inspection as per before painting check sheet
Inspection(Quality Gate No.-2 & 3).Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Paint Adhesion.Control Method: *Paint Inspection 100% as per paint check sheet.*Paint adhesion, DFT and Panit gloss to be check after 24 hrs. of the painting*After coat inspection check sheet
Paint Adhesion.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

DFT.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Measure Dry Film Thickness (Paint Thickness) 60 µm to 90µm
DFT.Control Method: *Paint Inspection 100% as per paint check sheet.*Paint adhesion, DFT and Panit gloss to be check after 24 hrs. of the painting*After coat inspection check sheet
DFT.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Paint Gloss.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Paint Gloss should be min. 90 at 20 ⁰ or 60 ⁰ as per CNH CE POWERTAN  STD 86628042
Paint Gloss.Control Method: *Paint Inspection 100% as per paint check sheet.*Paint adhesion, DFT and Panit gloss to be check after 24 hrs. of the painting*After coat inspection check sheet
Paint Gloss.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Appearance.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: should cover over all surface of the part, no rundown, fumes bubbles or shade difference, paint uncover, Orange Peel etc.
Appearance.Control Method: *Paint Inspection 100% as per paint check sheet.*Paint adhesion, DFT and Panit gloss to be check after 24 hrs. of the painting*After coat inspection check sheet
Appearance.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production incharge

Part fitment checking.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: All part availability compulsory  as per drawing

Appearance.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Door Assy  to be free from scratches, dent, damage and all other visual defects
Appearance.Control Method: *Spatter inspection check sheet*Maintain Lux level minimum 500 for Door Assy inspection.

Storage.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Duly completed assembly will be mounted on the dedicated trolly/Place for Storage
Storage.Reaction Plan: Identify and inform to Production incharge

RUBBER TRACK, BEADING-ASSEMBLY.Control Method:
Record in PDI & Part Fitment Report  
(F/QA/PDI/01) &  (F/QA/IP/WLD/04)
RUBBER TRACK, BEADING-ASSEMBLY.Reaction Plan: Put rejection tag, store in identified rejection area and inform to Production incharge

Finishing/ Cleaning.Product: Cleaning of the Insulation pasting surfaces
Finishing/ Cleaning.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: Ensure all the surfaces should be proper cleaned before dispatch
Finishing/ Cleaning.Reaction Plan: Put rejection / rework tag & inform to shop superior / production in charge

PDI.Reaction Plan: Put rejection tag and inform to production supervisor.

Move to Dispatch.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: As per packing and Dispatch schedule.
Move to Dispatch.Reaction Plan: Identify and inform to dispatch in charge

Dimension_1.Control Method:
Deploy only qualify welder on job.
* Inprocess inspection report & record register.
* Layout Inspection once in every year
*Part Fitment checksheet to be followed for 100% Inspection.
*Fixture Validation and Gauges Callibratin to be ensure as per "FIXTURE & GAUGE CALIBRATION  PLAN SHEET" (F/PLG/FMNT/01)
* Fixture PM plan to be followed as per "Fixture PM master plan sheet"
(F/PLG/FMNT/01)
*For Category-1 weld inspection 100% and other to be check as per sampling plan.
*All the Welding Fillets as per Welding Check Sheet.
Dimension_1.Reaction Plan:
Stop Work.
Inform to production supervisor. Put the tag on non conforming parts for rework with idenfication tag.
